title: gossypium latifolium var. deserticum
intro: Gossypium latifolium var. deserticum, commonly known as Desert Coton, is a variant of the cotton plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Desert Coton include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues due to its antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, Desert Coton is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, where its extracts are used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
